---
title: "F1 Analytics"
subtitle: "Objective insights from F1 race data — era transitions, parity, and narrative testing."
---

```{python}
#| echo: false
import json
from pathlib import Path

manifest_path = Path("../data/computed/manifest.json")
manifest = json.loads(manifest_path.read_text())

last_updated = manifest.get("last_updated", "unknown")[:10]
ff1_version = manifest.get("fastf1_version", "unknown")
exports = manifest.get("exports", {})

results_2022 = exports.get("results_2022_2025", {})
results_2026 = exports.get("results_2026", {})
```

## About this project

This site presents data-driven analysis of Formula 1 racing across the 2022–2026 regulation eras.
The primary focus is the **Ground Effect Era (2022–2025)** and how the **2026 Era** compares at the
equivalent stage — same metrics, same lens, one regulation cycle apart.

Each narrative page tests a widely-held piece of received F1 wisdom against the numbers, reports
what the data actually shows, and is honest about where the sample is too small to draw conclusions.

---

## Data coverage

```{python}
#| echo: false
import pandas as pd

rows = []
for name, meta in sorted(exports.items()):
    rows.append({
        "Dataset": name.replace("_", " ").title(),
        "Rows": f"{meta['rows']:,}",
        "Last exported": meta["exported_at"][:10],
    })

pd.DataFrame(rows).style.hide(axis="index")
```

**Source:** FastF1 v`{python} ff1_version` · OpenF1 REST API
**Last updated:** `{python} last_updated`
**2026 rounds completed:** Australia (R1), China (R2), Japan (R3) — next: Miami GP (~May 2026)

> Bahrain and Saudi Arabia (April 2026) cancelled due to regional conflict.

---

## Narratives

Seven hypotheses tested against the data. Each page states the received wisdom, defines the
metric, shows the chart, and delivers a verdict.

| # | Narrative | Verdict |
|---|---|---|
| 1 | [DNF Cause Categorisation](narratives/01-dnf-categorisation.qmd) | Inconclusive — data insufficient |
| 2 | [Ferrari Always Bottles It](narratives/02-ferrari-trajectory.qmd) | Not supported (2 seasons only) |
| 3 | [Monaco Produces Processional Races](narratives/03-monaco-overtake.qmd) | Partially supported |
| 4 | [Safety Car Lottery](narratives/04-safety-car.qmd) | Supported |
| 5 | [DRS Made Overtaking Artificial](narratives/05-drs-active-aero.qmd) | Not supported (3 rounds only) |
| 6 | [Races Are More Exciting Before the Pit Stop](narratives/06-pit-stop-excitement.qmd) | Partially supported — era-specific |
| 7 | [Turn 1 Chaos in Regulation Reset Years](narratives/07-turn1-chaos.qmd) | Supported |

---

## Era reference

| Era | Years | Key change |
|---|---|---|
| Ground Effect Era | 2022–2025 | Cost cap, ground effect aero, 18" tyres |
| 2026 Era | 2026– | New PU regs, active aero, current season |

Analysis of convergence tracks gap metrics by **year within era** (Year 1, Year 2…) rather than
calendar year, so 2022 and 2026 are directly comparable as regulation reset years.
